nodes.context: Yakuza organization based in Kagoshima, Kyushu, Japan, with about 40 active members.
Sub-group of Kozakura-ikka; its first kumicho was Kiei Hiraoka, who became fourth president of Kozakura-ikka.

edges.evidence_quote: 4th (1988-): Kiei Hiraoka (平岡 喜榮) who was 1st kumicho of the Hiraoka-gumi.
edges.context: Hiraoka-gumi is a sub-group of Kozakura-ikka, as its leader became the fourth president of Kozakura-ikka.
